notableEvents.label: Oswald Peraza pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza triples (1) on a ground ball to right fielder Angel Martínez.

notableEvents.label: Sebastián Rivero pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Sebastián Rivero strikes out on a foul tip.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Angel Martínez singles on a ground ball to third baseman Oswald Peraza. Petey Halpin to 3rd. Petey Halpin advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by third baseman Oswald Peraza.

notableEvents.label: Oswald Peraza pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza grounds out, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Kyle Manzardo.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Chase DeLauter GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Chase DeLauter grounds into a double play, second baseman Vaughn Grissom to shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Steven Kwan out at 2nd. Chase DeLauter out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: David Fry pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: David Fry flies out to center fielder Mike Trout.
